## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss weekly updates, content strategy, and performance tracking for clients D-Graph and Home Base.](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating interlinked, conceptual content for D-Graph rather than "how-to" articles](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Prioritize small business-focused content for Home Base](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Start tracking performance metrics like keywords, impressions, and traffic for published content](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Align with client teams to understand their existing processes and content needs](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Topics

### D-Graph Updates

  - [Published 5 articles last week, aiming for 8 this week](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Reviewed content topics and prioritized conceptual articles over "how-to" guides](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Discussed interlinking articles and building a knowledge hub](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Planned to share performance metrics like keywords, impressions from Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

### Home Base Updates

  - [Published 70 articles last week, refreshing 5 this week](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [Received feedback to make content more small business-focused](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
  - [Planned to use AI writing assistant to generate small business owner-centric topics](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
  - [Set up tracking for organic traffic, keywords, and costs for published URLs](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=2321.0)

### General Workflows

  - [Templatize weekly tasks for better client handoff](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Conduct deep dives with client teams to understand their processes](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)
  - [Onboard new executive assistant to support operations](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=2497.0)
  - [Standardize performance reporting across clients](https://fathom.video/share/qW4kxxrsssJ-RupNXPRXqjYaDMwTE_9b?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
